drakloak_recon_directive.policy: Activate independently for each Drakloak, keep the highest route-value card and bottom the other.

dragapult_phantom_dive.source: CardImpl.h CreateCard(121); EffectInstant.h SelectDamageCounterAny and SelectedDamageCounterAny
dragapult_phantom_dive.policy: Resolve six separate ten-damage-counter decisions: KO, high-Prize target, 130/50 Cursed Blast band, then lowest remaining HP.

dusclops_cursed_blast.policy: Reject activation unless it takes a Prize, enables immediate Dragapult lethal, or creates an energy-ready Azelf terminal.

dusknoir_cursed_blast.policy: Reject activation unless it takes a Prize, enables immediate Dragapult lethal, or creates an energy-ready Azelf terminal.

rare_candy.option_contract: EVOLVE option contains Stage 2 area/index and Basic inPlayArea/inPlayIndex
rare_candy.policy: Attack-ready Dragapult outranks Dusknoir unless the bomb route has immediate positive Prize value.

crispin.policy: Keep the urgent missing colour available for attachment and target the exact incomplete instance.

cinderace_turbo_flare.policy: Select fewer than three when appropriate; choose only Energy that completes coloured Dragapult routes.
